hero.title: Clipboard Manager
hero.description: Save useful text snippets locally, search your browser-only clipboard history, and copy entries back when needed.

features.title: A private place for reusable copied text
features.description: Clipboard Manager keeps V1 focused on explicit user actions and local browser storage.

items.title: Save text entries
items.description: Paste or type text manually, add an optional label, and save it locally.

items.title: Search history
items.description: Filter saved entries by label or content without sending clipboard text to the API.

items.title: Copy when needed
items.description: Copy a saved entry back to the clipboard from Workspace or History.

flow.title: Paste -> Save -> Reuse
steps: Paste or manually type clipboard text
Search history and copy entries back

benefits.title: Keep small text fragments easy to revisit
benefits.description: V1 helps users manage copied text without background monitoring, uploads, or backend persistence.

items.title: Privacy-first
items.description: Clipboard contents remain in the current browser's local storage.

items.title: Explicit control
items.description: The app reads clipboard text only after the user chooses Paste from clipboard.

items.title: Fast retrieval
items.description: Search and copy useful entries instead of hunting through scattered notes.

differences.title: Designed for controlled clipboard history
differences.description: Clipboard Manager avoids background capture and focuses on intentional saves.

items.title: Capture
items.description: Add clipboard text manually or through an explicit paste action.

items.title: Review
items.description: Search saved entries and inspect local-only history.

items.title: Reuse
items.description: Copy saved text back to the clipboard when needed.

feel.title: Quiet, direct, and under user control
feel.description: The V1 experience keeps clipboard management simple while respecting sensitive copied text.

items.title: No background monitoring
items.description: Entries are saved only when the user submits them.

items.title: Clear history
items.description: Saved text is listed with dates, labels, search, and delete controls.

items.title: Useful insights
items.description: Local stats summarize total entries, recent saves, longest entry, and copy activity.

useCases.title: Useful for repeated text
useCases.description: Clipboard Manager is best for short-lived text snippets users want to revisit locally.

items.title: Work notes

items.title: Developer snippets
items.description: Keep local commands or small code fragments handy while working.

items.title: Everyday text
items.description: Save addresses, IDs, or phrases temporarily without backend sync.

items.title: Professionals
items.description: Revisit copied text during focused work sessions.

items.title: Privacy-conscious users

technicalSection.title: Local-first V1 implementation
technicalSection.description: Clipboard Manager follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture while keeping clipboard contents out of backend persistence.
items: Zustand app-local state with browser localStorage persistence.
No backend clipboard-content API calls, sync, uploads, or background monitoring.

items.question: Does Clipboard Manager sync clipboard text to Ansiversa servers?
items.answer: No. V1 stores saved entries only in the current browser's local storage.

items.question: Does it read my clipboard automatically?
items.answer: No. Clipboard text is read only after the user chooses Paste from clipboard, and manual paste remains available.

items.question: Can I remove saved entries?
items.answer: Yes. History supports deleting individual entries and clearing all local entries.

finalCta.title: Open Clipboard Manager
finalCta.description: Save text locally and keep useful snippets ready to copy back.
